steps.t: Adalfon at the village of Hultvís may have a request for you.
Veremund is by the cooking fires in the village of Hultvís.
Eurik is in the village of Hultvís.
Eurik, a hunter from Hultvís, was frightened away from his prey by a terrible apparition at the Old Ford, located in the Wolf-denes north-west of the …
Karazgar stares at you, his eyes filled with malice.
Gandalf stands with Elrond outside the Beorninghús.
